block_02: On November 3, 2020, the US presidential election was held. Republican candidate Donald J. Trump and Democratic candidate Joe Biden were opposed to each other. As a preliminary result of the election race, Joe Biden became the new president-elect of the United States with 290 electoral votes. Though the official results haven't been announced yet, there's a high chance the Democrat will be standing at the helm of the new America for the upcoming four years.
